name_en: [Size Code Chip Version] Model: M12106 Rose Red Small. This style features a double-sided design. The iconic Neverfull BB bag: always meets your tote needs. Spacious yet not bulky, structured yet soft, suitable for home and travel. Tighten the side drawstrings to instantly transform into a chic city bag. Loosen the drawstrings to become a stylish and practical handbag. The long leather handle is suitable for shoulder or arm carry. Shown here in Damier Azur canvas. Dimensions: 24x19x9cm
